helm.name: Helm (Treasure)

findings: *** ROSTER-WIDE SSOT GAP *** 0.591 COLD root cause: blablalink sync carries NO treasure-phase prose; materialize froze the UNTREASURED base kit. Dropped: S2 '178.98% full-charge bonus hit' (~doubles sustained fire) + S2 FB attack-damage 11.85->27.87. The 2026-07-14 validated 0.99 state INCLUDED both via the old runtime parser (model never drifted, source text did). Affects ALL (Treasure) units (helm, laplace...). HIGH PRIORITY owner reconciliation

✅ RESOLVED 2026-07-17 (favorite-item sync + reconcile): DB now carries treasure prose. Enacted S2 FB attack-damage 11.85→27.87 (all allies) + S2 178.98% full-charge hit (shotFired, every charged shot) + burst 54.45% recovery as heal event. Board 0.591 COLD → 1.014 ±3%✓ (5 comps 0.98-1.05); teammates warmed by the restored 27.87 team buff (crown 1.029/privaty 0.977/anis-star 0.952/SWHA 1.11). noir anchor +0.0000%; FB asserts all green.

helm.evidence: Helm SR frame recording — 1.37s cycle + 22f bolt recovery measured; 0.93-1.19
caveats: skill2: the 178.98% full-charge additional hit is modeled on shotFired (every SR pull = one full charge); if a focus video shows it not firing every charged shot, retune the trigger
burst: the 158.4% Charge Damage 'for 10 round(s)' is approximated as durationSec 13 (~8 rounds incl. the mid-window reload; 10 rounds ~= 16-17s)
